boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment/invoice/vendor-master action when callback provenance is current and matched to vendor master contact
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL confirms callback log matches authorized contact/action exactly
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defect; anomaly notes do not override

critical_features_preserved: callback log must match authorized contact and action
final_answer: Source records close the boundary. CTL confirms callback log matches authorized contact and action exactly, with matching scope and date. Policy permits execution when records close the boundary. Anomaly notes and fallback context do not override the controlling CTL. Action may proceed.
